## Checklist

- [ ] `mkdocs serve --strict` runs without errors or warnings
- [ ] Spelling and style follow the [n8n style guide](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n-docs/wiki/Styles)
- [ ] `nav.yml` updated if pages were added or renamed
- [ ] No Insiders-only theme features added without a free-tier fallback
- [ ] Tabs (not spaces) preserved in all code samples
